RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0031 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Aisha Park Date of Birth: 24/02/1968 SSN (tokenized): TKN-708836 Annual Income: $110,000 Employer: Globex Loan Amount: $41,000 Term (months): 72 Branch: Leeds Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN12422AL BMW Corolla 2021 Hybrid CPO 53,000 VIN96919AL Kia Elantra 2024 ICE New 48,000 Authorized Signature: Aisha Park
